emails.body: Re: Exmar Purchase Decision Rick, It would be difficult to use option approach to directly to ships (no historical price series and no regular, continuos markets). The right approach is th real options model that requiresa lot of time to develop. From: Rick Buy 05/22/2000 01:35 PM
